title: Javlya Fort
tagline: Javlya Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Javlya Fort (Marathi: जवळ्या किल्ला, Hindi: जवळ्या किला, (transliteration: Marathi-"Javḷyā Killā and Hindi: Javḷyā Kilā or Qilā) is located 43 km from Nashik, Nashik district, of M
overview.description: Javlya Fort (Marathi: जवळ्या किल्ला, Hindi: जवळ्या किला, (transliteration: Marathi-"Javḷyā Killā and Hindi: Javḷyā Kilā or Qilā) is located 43 km from Nashik, Nashik district, of Maharashtra. Javlya fort and Ravlya fort are twin forts located on a single hill plateau, Ravlya on the west and Javlya on the east side of the hill plateau.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Dhunda fort
topPlaces.description: Dhunda Fort (Marathi: धुंदा किल्ला, Hindi: धुंदया किला, transliteration: Dhundya Qilа̄)is located 106 km from Nashik, Nashik district, of Maharashtra.The Dhundya fort is located on a single hillock west of the road from Malegaon to Satana.

topPlaces.name: Ravlya Fort
topPlaces.description: Ravalya Fort (Marathi: रवळ्या किल्ला, Hindi: रवल्या किला, transliteration: Ravalya Qilа̄)is located 43 km from Nashik, Nashik district, of Maharashtra. The Ravlya fort and Javlya fort are twin forts located on a single hill plateau.

topPlaces.name: Satmala Range
topPlaces.description: Satmala (pronunciation:[sɐtmaːla]) is a mountain range which runs across Nashik District, Maharashtra. They are an integral part of the Sahyadris range within Nashik.

topPlaces.name: Saptashrungi
topPlaces.description: Saptashrungi or Saptashringi (Marathi: सप्तशृङ्गि, Saptaśr̥ṇgī) is a site of Hindu pilgrimage in the village of Vani, situated 60 kilometres (37 mi) from Nashik in Indian state of Maharashtra. According to Hindu traditions, the goddess Saptashrungi Nivasini dwells within the seven mountain peaks.

topPlaces.name: Dhodap
topPlaces.description: Dhodap is one of the hill forts in Maharashtra state in India. Situated in Chandwad taluka in the Nashik district.

topPlaces.name: Nanduri Dam
topPlaces.description: Nanduri Dam, is an earthfill and gravity dam on Tapti river near Ama Local Nallaher, Nashik district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

items.note: Dhunda Fort (Marathi: धुंदा किल्ला, Hindi: धुंदया किला, transliteration: Dhundya Qilа̄)is located 106 km from Nashik, Nashik district, of Maharashtra.The Dhundya fort is located on a single hillock west of the road from Malegaon to Satana.

Ravalya Fort (Marathi: रवळ्या किल्ला, Hindi: रवल्या किला, transliteration: Ravalya Qilа̄)is located 43 km from Nashik, Nashik district, of Maharashtra. The Ravlya fort and Javlya fort are twin forts located on a single hill plateau.
Satmala (pronunciation:[sɐtmaːla]) is a mountain range which runs across Nashik District, Maharashtra. They are an integral part of the Sahyadris range within Nashik.

Saptashrungi or Saptashringi (Marathi: सप्तशृङ्गि, Saptaśr̥ṇgī) is a site of Hindu pilgrimage in the village of Vani, situated 60 kilometres (37 mi) from Nashik in Indian state of Maharashtra. According to Hindu traditions, the goddess Saptashrungi Nivasini dwells within the seven mountain peaks.
Dhodap is one of the hill forts in Maharashtra state in India. Situated in Chandwad taluka in the Nashik district.
Nanduri Dam, is an earthfill and gravity dam on Tapti river near Ama Local Nallaher, Nashik district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Javlya Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Javlya Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Javlya Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Javlya Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Javlya Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Javlya Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Javlya Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Javlya Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dhunda fort, Ravlya Fort, Satmala Range, Saptashrungi, Dhodap.
